text:
Chronic Conditions Warehouse 
CODEBOOK: Medicare Part D Beneficiary Plan Election and Auto-Assignment │ October 2021 │ V 1.3 12 

PLAN_ID 

LABEL: Part D Plan Benefit Package Identifier 

DESCRIPTION: This variable is the unique plan benefit package (PBP) number for the Part D plan sponsor's contract. 
CMS assigns an identifier to each PBP within a contract that a Part D plan sponsor has with CMS. 

This field is a key that links Part D sponsor's contract and plan identifiers. 

TYPE: CHAR
